name: Bul Kogi (Korean Barbecue)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sesame seeds, toasted and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beef short ribs in a bowl.
2. Add the garlic, sesame seeds, green onions, pepper, sesame oil, soy sauce, sugar, and oil to the bowl. Toss everything together well to coat the meat evenly.
3. Cover the bowl and let the mixture stand at room temperature for 2 hours.
4. When ready to cook, barbecue over coals or broil under a broiler, turning the ribs often and basting with the marinade until the meat is tender.
Created by: Wailea Steak House, Hawaii (C) 1992 The Los Angeles Times
